summary: Tested two bug fixes: (1) Dashboard/Sales count using Sales table as source of truth, (2) Inline customer creation in Record Sale modal. All 5 backend tests pass. UI tests confirmed all flows working.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST Customer Inline (9800000001) during UI testing via inline form. Not cleaned up.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dashboard sold=2 matches Sales page Total Sales=2. Inline customer creation in Record Sale modal works: UserPlus button (data-testid=add-customer-inline-btn) opens form, fills name+phone+address, Create & Select creates customer and auto-selects in dropdown with 'Customer added!' toast. Backend accounting-summary endpoint is at /api/reports/accounting-summary (not /reports/accounting). Finance summary at /api/finance/summary.
rca_of_issue: No bugs found. Both fixes verified working correctly.
